title: Why do people like Rei Ayanami
display_title: Why do people like Rei Ayanami
summary: []: Why do people like Rei Ayanami?             Quote Post by ReijiAyanami » Tue Jan 30, 2024 4:00 am If me..... I like her because she is very loving and Wise and much more....But I like her the most because she is basically the Christ Figure when I actually understand her and try interpret the show with the bible it's very beautiful not only for her like for Asuka, Shinji, Gendo and more....it was just very beautiful and maybe I would try

chunks.content:
Article: Why do people like Rei Ayanami
[]: Why do people like Rei Ayanami?             Quote Post by ReijiAyanami » Tue Jan 30, 2024 4:00 am If me..... I like her because she is very loving and Wise and much more....But I like her the most because she is basically the Christ Figure when I actually understand her and try interpret the show with the bible it's very beautiful not only for her like for Asuka, Shinji, Gendo and more....it was just very beautiful and maybe I would try make video about it somewhere so maybe people can understand how I understand because im serious it really beautiful! It even make me return to Christ and now I'm having a loving relationship with the God that love me first..... But it very sad that people oversexualized the character on Evangelion like Rei or Asuka or maybe Misato or Shinji? Because If they did they would make them get misunderstood by people....And even watching the series is already easy to misunderstood them....But well Neon Genesis Evangelion for me is just us humans struggling with sins and God wanted to help us but we reject it....But well I understand if you guys had different perspectives because it is normal... Just pray for me if you guys wanted me to make the video because well....prayer do help so I'm thankful for anyone who pray for me....and if there anything you wanted me to pray I can and I would love to!... anyways Take care of yourself and keep on living and also I love whoever you are! "I love Whoever you are" "Jesus loves all of you" "God bless and peace" "Stay safe and Take care yourself I Love you"

[]: Re: Why do people like Rei Ayanami?             Quote Post by viperzero » Wed Jan 31, 2024 7:33 pm I think Asuka is a great character but I had family a lot like her and I feel “safer” around Rei.
